title: Homognaphalium pulvinatum

intro: Homognaphalium pulvinatum, also known as Mountain Sneeeweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its distinctive clusters of small, white or pink flowers. The health benefits of Homognaphalium pulvinatum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as colds and congestion, due to its expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities.
